{{Quote|Folk drink more when they're happy than when they're worried. Tip better too.|Enan reflects on the effect of the Cartel message|<ref name="ACP">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}}</ref>}}
'''Vanster Enan''' was the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] owner and barkeep of [[Vanster Enan's Sop House]]. He was proud of his establishment and had a selection of drinks from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were a bit high priced because of the difficulties of shipping into the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]], so he also sold a house special, which was a homebrewed drink he called a "fine [[Ithorian brandy]]."<ref name="ACP" />

He was the cousin of [[Vareesa Enan]], and once bought her a ticket to [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].<ref name="ATJ">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030102ralltiir1|series=A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir|text=Part 1: World of Watchers}}</ref> Vanster was also a cousin of [[Ulo Enan]], who worked in the city of [[Rorkee]], in [[Genarius]].<ref name="hitc">{{LivingForce|Clouds of Genarius: Head in the Clouds}}</ref>
